query:
SELECT id, originalName, createdAt,
  JSON_EXTRACT(dfInfo, '$.groupByField') as groupByField,
  JSON_EXTRACT(dfInfo, '$.row_count') as row_count,
  JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(dfInfo, '$.fields')) as field_count
FROM sessions 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user UpQ6nzGwi5FMPrH.root --database CRyFQH5qGudysyWQuRqoNj --execute SELECT id, originalName, createdAt,
  JSON_EXTRACT(dfInfo, '$.groupByField') as groupByField,
  JSON_EXTRACT(dfInfo, '$.row_count') as row_count,
  JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(dfInfo, '$.fields')) as field_count
FROM sessions 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;
